creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
It’s time to @visit.hatta! 🤗

Hatta Season 7 has begun and we’re so excited that we immediately planned for a unique getaway!

We stayed at Damani Lodges; one of the glamping sites at Hatta Resorts. We spent a night in a cozy mountain cabin, had BBQ dinner under the stars, woke up to a breakfast picnic, and enjoyed fun outdoor activities like axe throwing and archery! 

Book your stay at visithatta.com and get discounts on outdoor activities.

Plan your trip now! Tag your fam and friends!

Visit Hatta • Damani Lodges • Hatta • Where to go in Dubai • Dubai Destinations • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: I'll follow you into the park, through the jungle, through the dark Girl, I never loved one like you Boats and boats and waterfalls, highways and payphone calls I'll be in every one with you We'll laugh until we think we'll die, barefoot on a summer night
